title: GoVTrace Receipt
description: A v1 GoVTrace Receipt: a portable, third-party-verifiable, Ed25519-signed attestation that an AI action was evaluated by a named policy and produced a named verdict at a named time.

receipt_id.description: Unique identifier for this receipt. Format is issuer-defined.

signed_at.description: RFC 3339 UTC timestamp at which the receipt was signed.

signature.description: Unpadded base64url Ed25519 signature over sha256(canonical_bytes).

public_key_id.description: Stable identifier for the issuing public key. MUST equal the key_id field in the issuer's published key document.

signed_fields.description: Ordered list of keys present in signed_fields_data.

signed_fields_data.description: The actual key->value mapping that was canonicalized and signed.

run_id.description: Issuer-defined identifier for the AI action being attested.

verdict.description: The decision: STOP, NEEDS_REVIEW, SAFE, or issuer-defined.

record_hash.description: Lowercase SHA-256 hex of the canonical Duty-of-Care Record.

policy_digest.description: Lowercase SHA-256 hex of the policy bundle that produced the verdict.

input_hash.description: Lowercase SHA-256 hex of the AI action's input bytes.

timestamp.description: RFC 3339 UTC timestamp of the verdict.

canonical_digest.description: Lowercase SHA-256 hex of the canonical bytes of signed_fields_data.

pdf_url.description: Optional issuer-served URL to a human-readable PDF rendition.

verify_url.description: Optional issuer-served URL to walk the chain (if the issuer maintains one).
